definitions: The final problem in a series of problems that causes someone to lose patience or give up.
The minor or last in a series of irritations that exceeds the limit of one's endurance.
examples: When he insulted my family, that was the last straw.
The broken printer was the last straw; I decided to quit.
After weeks of delays, the cancellation of the flight was the last straw.
synonyms: the straw that broke the camel's back
